MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Seth Skootsky for Martin Goodman.

The Court granted the extenstion of the Temporary Trustee's powers to October 31, 2013 (subject to review of the order). Status on the Petition for Final Distribution and status on appointment of permanent Trustee are continued to May 29, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Nancy Bautista/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Appointment Of A Permanent Trustee
Off Calendar Dec-31-2012 Continued To Apr-29-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Seth Skootsky for Martin Goodman (Temporary Trustee).

Mr. Skootsky reported that he is working on the Temporary Trustee's Petition for Final Distribution and Final Accounting and that the Petition will be filed by the end of January and that he is requesting to extend the Temporary Trustee's powers to end of April. The Court extended the Temporary Trustee's powers to April 29, 2013 and set a status hearing on the Petition for Final Distribution on the same date (order for the same signed in open court).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

Off Calendar Jul-09-2012 Continued To Sep-10-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PES-11-294640 Estate of Walter Lembi.

Appearances: Seth Skootsky for and with Martin Goodman.

Mr. Skootksy and Mr. Goodman stated that the Bankruptcy Trustee is challenging/trying to claim their assets, that there is no valuation on the interest in the property and that all they can do is try to wrap things up and turn over any assets to the IRS. Mr. Skootksy also requested continuing the Trusteeship for 60 day and stated that they hope to do a Petition for Final Distribution and present some form of settlement for Court approval. The Petition for Letters of Administration was taken off calendar. The Petition for Termination of Special Administration and For Order Approving Compensation was granted (subject to review of the order). The Trust matter was continued to September 10, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Further Status To See If Any Other Appointed/Named Party Wants To Serve
Off Calendar Jan-09-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PTR-11-294640 Estate of Walter Lembi.

Appearances: Seth Skootsky for and with Martin Goodman. Andrew Neilson for C.W. Capitol Asset Management (Creditor).

Mr. Skootsky stated that his Client was unable to locate any assets of the Estate, that all of the Creditor's had been given notice and addressed the issues raised in the Examiner's notes with regard to allowance of Special Administrator's fees at Attorney rates, approving Estate fees from the Trust and overlap of billings in the Estate and the Trust. Status to see if any other Party wants to serve was taken off calendar. The Court granted the Petition for Order Approving Compensation of Trustee, etc. (subject to further review of the Court as to any further reductions and review of the order). Status on appointment of a permanent Trustee was set for July 9, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Petition for Letters of Administration and the Petition for Termination of Special Administration, etc. were continued to July 9, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The temporary Trustee will continue to serve until that date.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Order Approving Compensation Of Trustee, Compensation Of Attorneys To Trustee And Payment Of Expensesod Administration Of Ext. Of Walter R. Lembi
Off Calendar Jan-11-2012 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Further Status To See If Any Other Appointed/Named Party Wants To Serve
Off Calendar Oct-31-2011 Continued To Jan-09-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PES-11-294640 Estate of Walter Lembi.

Appearances: Seth Skootsky for and with Martin Goodman (Special Administrator/Temporary Trustee) and for Deutsche Bank.

Judge Wiss recused herself from hearing these matters. The matters were continued to January 9, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The letters of Special Administration and powers of the Temporary Trustee are also extended to that date (orders to be signed by another Judicial Officer).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

Petition To Appoint Temporary Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-27-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PES-11-294640 Estate of Walter Lembi.

Appearances: Seth Skootsy for and with Martin Goodman (Trust Matter). Seth Skootsky for Deutsche Bank (Estate Matter). Robert Green for New York Life.

The Court granted the Petition to Appoint Temporary Trustee (subject to review of the order). Bond is set at $135,000.00. Further status to see if any other appointed/named Party wants to serve was set for October 31, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Petition for Letters of Administration was also continued to October 31, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Contreras.
